---
title: "Emily Charlotte Pye"
---

## Emily Charlotte Pye

**Dates:** (b.1830/1)

**Maiden name:** (Wilberforce)

### Description

daughter of the Rt. Rev. Samuel Wilberforce

### Biography

She married (1851) the Rev. Henry John Pye (1827-1903), Rector of Clifton Campville; they both converted to Rome in 1868. [LG 1906; ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 30th [1867]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
